Officer Onboarding Fee Disclosure Package
Confidential — For Incoming CEO / Senior Leadership
Company
{{companyName}}
Incoming Officer
{{officerName}}
Prepared Date
{{preparedDate}}
Engagement Reference
{{ref}}
§ 01Welcome

Congratulations on your appointment. This package contains a complete record of Forhemit's engagement with {{companyName}}, including all fee disclosures, payment history, and stewardship terms. It is provided for full transparency as you assume leadership of an employee-owned company.

§ 02Package Contents

This disclosure package includes the following documents:

A.Fee Schedule (Exhibit A) — The complete fee schedule from the original Engagement Letter, showing tier-based pricing, milestone triggers, and stewardship fee terms.
B.Post-Close Stewardship Payment Schedule (#124) — A detailed tranche-by-tranche payment schedule showing amounts, due dates, and payment status.
C.Pre-Close Board Resolution (#120) — The board resolution authorizing all fee payments, including the Success Balance paid at closing.
D.Transition Stewardship Agreement Summary (#126) — A plain-language summary of Forhemit's role, services, and fee scope during the post-close stewardship period.
§ 03Engagement Fee Summary
{{feeTier}}
{{totalFee}}
{{retainerAmount}} — {{retainerStatus}}
{{validationAmount}} — {{validationStatus}}
{{commitmentAmount}} — {{commitmentStatus}}
{{successAmount}} — {{successStatus}}
All Clear: All transaction milestone fees have been paid in full. No outstanding balance remains from the original engagement.
§ 04Ongoing Stewardship Fee
{{annualStewardshipFee}}
{{billingFrequency}}
{{remainingTranches}} of {{totalTranches}}
{{stewardshipEndDate}}

The stewardship fee covers ongoing ESOP operational support, COOP maintenance, compliance coordination, and quarterly reporting. It is a tax-deductible business expense and does not affect employee distributions.

§ 05Key Contacts
Stefano Stokes, Founder & Managing Director

§ 06Acknowledgment

By receiving this package, the incoming officer acknowledges that they have been fully informed of all fees paid and payable to Forhemit in connection with the ESOP transaction and post-close stewardship of {{companyName}}.

Forhemit Stewardship Management Co.
deals@forhemit.com | forhemit.com
